phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove inizia Via Garibaldi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh in-EE-tsa vee-ah gah-ree-BAL-dee, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: At the entrance of each museum.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how many palaces are on the street
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanti palazzi ci sono in Via Garibaldi?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-tee pah-LAHT-tsee chee SOH-noh een VEE-ah gah-ree-BAL-dee?
phrases.cultural_note: Via Garibaldi, known as the Strada Nuova, has 12 palaces listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

responses.english: Twelve palaces, all UNESCO World Heritage.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy a combined museum ticket
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si compra il biglietto combinato per i musei di Via Garibaldi?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see KOM-prah eel beel-YET-toh kom-bee-NAH-toh per ee moo-ZEH-ee dee VEE-ah gah-ree-BAL-dee?

responses.english: At the ticket desk of Palazzo Rosso at number eleven.
responses.phonetic: AL-lah KAS-sah dee pah-LAHT-tsoh ROS-soh al noo-MEH-roh OON-dee-chee.
responses.local: Alla cassa di Palazzo Rosso al numero undici.
